title: Appendicula tenuispica
taxonomy: Appendicula tenuispica is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Appendicula is part of the subtribe Aeridinae and tribe Aeridinae. Appendicula tenuispica is native to Borneo. It is a type of terrestrial orchid, found in lowland forests.
uses: Appendicula tenuispica, also known as the delicate appendicula, is a species of orchid that has been found to have potential medicinal properties. Research on this plant has revealed its possible use in treating various health conditions, although more studies are needed to confirm its efficacy.
